positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical mandalic composition featuring stylized celestial geometry and bioluminescent flora. The main subjects include interlocking moons, abstract constellation lines, and ornate botanical elements like fern fronds and stylized lotuses. Style is a mix of Japanese ukiyo-e woodblock print and intricate zentangle illustration, rendered with sharp, distinct black lines and a limited palette of deep indigo, teal, and metallic gold accents. Emphasis on perfect negative space, strong contrast, and clean, repeating patterns suitable for repeat apparel printing. Central, circular composition, symmetrical layout. Minimalist yet maximalist feel.
negative: blur, noisy, low resolution, jpeg artifacts, watermark, text, letters, signature, logo, trademark, copyright, cartoon, photorealism, bad anatomy, extra limbs, asymmetric, dirty, cluttered
